flashcards.front: How do you check an equation with dimensional analysis?
flashcards.back: Replace variables with their dimensions. Check if both sides match. If not, the equation is wrong.
Speed or velocity. Length divided by time.

flashcards.front: Can dimensional analysis prove an equation is RIGHT?
flashcards.back: No, only that it's plausible. It definitely proves an equation is WRONG if dimensions don't match.
